## What would you like?

<!-- Describe the feature clearly. What should it do? -->

## Why does it matter?

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who would it help — humans, agents, or both? -->

## Does this fit the project philosophy?

<!-- Speculae is local-first, zero-telemetry, and private. 
     Does this feature respect those principles? -->

- [ ] Works offline (no network required for core functionality)
- [ ] No new external services or accounts
- [ ] Respects local-first data ownership

<!-- Optional: sketch an implementation idea, a CLI design, a UI mockup, or a data model -->

## Related issues or prior art
